mapper.insert: INSERT INTO files_versions (version_id, file_id, revision_no, user_id, `timestamp`, size, mimetype, storage_key, metadata) VALUES (#{versionId}, #{fileId}, #{revisionNo}, #{userId}, #{timestamp}, #{size}, #{mimetype}, #{storageKey}, #{metadata})
mapper.select: SELECT storage_key FROM files_versions WHERE version_id = #{versionId} LIMIT 1
SELECT mimetype FROM files_versions WHERE version_id = #{versionId} LIMIT 1

SELECT version_id, file_id, revision_no, user_id, `timestamp`, size, mimetype, storage_key, metadata FROM files_versions WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND `timestamp` > #{targetTimestamp} ORDER BY `timestamp` ASC, revision_no ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT version_id AS versionId, file_id AS fileId, revision_no AS revisionNo, storage_key AS storageKey, mimetype, size FROM files_versions WHERE version_id = #{versionId}
